caption: A man with short grey hair and a grey polo shirt speaks while gesturing with his hand in an indoor exhibition hall. Behind him, another man wearing glasses and a light grey button-down shirt observes the scene. In the background, a banner displays the text "MicroMaker3D" at the top, and below it, a yellow section includes the phrase "Lightbased innovation." The banner also features bullet points with text such as "microscopic, high-resolution 3D printing" and "Microprinting." As the sequence progresses, the speaking man continues his address, shifting his head slightly and blinking, while the man behind him remains relatively still. A name tag is visible on the speaking man's chest, and other exhibition booths and people are faintly visible in the distant background of the brightly lit venue.
